records.title: O*NET — Software Developers 15-1252, In-Demand Skills 2026
records.summary: O*NET flags distributed systems, cloud-native runtime (Kubernetes), and Python as the fastest-rising in-demand skills for software developer roles through 2026.

records.title: O*NET — Data Scientists 15-2051, In-Demand Skills 2026
records.summary: O*NET 2026 skill index for data scientists emphasizes ML systems design, SQL at scale, and applied statistics; deep-learning framework fluency remains a differentiator.
